ruleset.name: DCC groth16 Rules
ruleset.description:
Custom PMD ruleset for groth16. This module contains: - Hand-written JNI bridge classes (Groth16.java for BLS12 and BN256) - ZWavesJNILibrary.java — native library loader entry point - JNILibrary.java — hawtjni utility class (3rd-party, EPL-1.0)
Patterns intentionally excluded: - JNILibrary.java uses duplicate string literals (internal hawtjni idiom) - JNILibrary.java stores `null` as an initial sentinel for File building - JNILibrary.java uses ArrayList<Throwable> in its error-collection API - JNILibrary.java methods take byte[] and int[] directly (JNI contract)
